sourceMovie.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Everything Everywhere All at Once works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Alita: Battle Angel
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Everything Everywhere All at Once clicked for you, Alita: Battle Angel (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Everything Everywhere All at Once?
faq.answer: Try Alita: Battle Angel, Jumper, Rebel Moon - Part One: A Child of Fire—each shares DNA with Everything Everywhere All at Once while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Everything Everywhere All at Once?
faq.answer: Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Everything Everywhere All at Once worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
